=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/effectSucceedWithVoid_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)


==== /.src/effectSucceedWithVoid_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics effectSucceedWithVoid:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.succeed(undefined)
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377016: `Effect.void` represents the same outcome as `Effect.succeed(undefined)` or `Effect.succeed(void 0)`. effect(effectSucceedWithVoid)
